heading: Drawback of tax
label: 5706 Drawback of tax
text: There shall be an allowance of drawback of tax paid on tobacco products and cigarette papers and tubes, when shipped from the United States, in accordance with such regulations and upon the filing of such bond as the Secretary shall prescribe.
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–4551958— substituted “tobacco products and cigarette papers and tubes” for “articles”.Pub. L. 85–859
Effective Date of 1958 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 85–859section 210(a)(1) of Pub. L. 85–859section 5001 of this titleSept. 3, 1958
